title: Melted Mexican Prawns Skewers
description: Juicy king prawns glazed with a sweet lime‑honey lacquer, grilled to perfection and garnished with cilantro. A quick crowd‑pleaser that keeps the prawns tender and flavorful.
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
In a small bowl whisk together lime juice, honey, smoked paprika, chili powder, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Toss the chilled prawns in the glaze, ensuring each prawn is coated evenly.
Thread 4‑5 prawns onto each stick, leaving a small gap between them.
Lightly oil the grill grates or spray the grill pan to prevent sticking.
Place the prawn skewers on the grill and cook for 2 minutes on one side.
Flip the skewers over and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the prawns turn pink and are slightly charred.
While still hot, drizzle any remaining glaze over the skewers for a lacquered shine.
Remove from grill and let rest for 1 minute.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
